name: HUB24 Limited
summary: HUB24 Limited, together with its subsidiaries, provides wealth management solutions for the financial services industry in Australia. It operates through Platform, Licensee, and IT Services segments. The company develops and operates HUB24, an investment and superannuation platform, which is a portfolio administration services for financial advisers, stockbrokers, accountants and their clients, and direct consumers. It also provides compliance, software, education, and business support to advisers; and application and technology products for the financial services sector. In addition, the company offers software license and IT consulting services, as well as business, managed portfolio, and retirement solutions. The company was formerly known as Investorfirst Ltd. and changed its name to HUB24 Limited in August 2013. HUB24 Limited was founded in 2007 and is headquartered in Sydney, Australia.
